name: Dislike eco news by id -- @1.1
fullName: Dislike Eco News: Dislike eco news by id

steps.name: Given the user is authorized
When I send request to dislike eco news with id "1"
Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message should be Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 1

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 1

parameterValues: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 1
